# Clippers HQ

## About
Clippers HQ is the leading content clipping platform connecting short-form video creators (clippers) with brands, artists, streamers, and personal brands for paid campaign collaborations. Clippers earn money by creating short-form video clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

## What We Do
- Connect content clippers with brand campaigns across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Provide a complete campaign management platform for brands and agencies
- Automated clip tracking with real-time view counting and earnings calculation
- CPM-based payout system with transparent earnings for creators
- Gamification system with levels, streaks, and bonus earnings for active clippers
- Professional analytics dashboards for both creators and brand clients
- Multi-platform support: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube
- Agency management tools for clipping agencies and their teams

## Who Uses Clippers HQ
- Content clippers and short-form video creators looking for paid campaigns
- Brands seeking short-form video marketing and UGC content
- Music artists promoting new releases through clip campaigns
- Streamers and gaming creators running brand deals
- Marketing agencies managing multiple creator campaigns
- Personal brands scaling their social media presence
- Clipping agencies managing teams of content creators

## Key Features
- Real-time clip performance tracking (views, likes, comments, shares)
- Automated CPM-based earnings calculation
- Streak and level system rewarding consistent creators
- Campaign budget management with automatic pause when budget is reached
- Client dashboard for brands to monitor campaign performance
- Excel report exports for campaign analytics
- PWA mobile app with bonus earnings for installed users
- Referral system for growing the creator network
- Multi-role support: Clippers, Admins, Agency Owners, Brand Clients

## Services
- Best clipping platform for TikTok creators
- Best content clipping agency platform
- Short-form video campaign management
- UGC creator marketplace
- Brand campaign analytics and reporting
- Clipper earnings and payout management
- Content creator monetization platform
- Video clip tracking and performance analytics

## Industry
Content creation, influencer marketing, short-form video, social media marketing, creator economy, UGC platforms
